what_this_is: Per-step transition cost in a parallel pipeline: total asyncio.gather time divided by N. At this N the gather's setup + scheduling overhead dominates, so it runs HIGHER than the linear chain — the amortisation only pays off once the steps block on real I/O (not modelled here).
what_this_is_not: Real concurrency. Each mock step returns in ~50 ns of Python work, which the event loop runs serially. The scheduling-amortisation effect we capture here is real, but a real concurrency speedup requires the steps to block on I/O (which lives in the per-tool benches).
